text:
[...]
/usr/local/include/date/tz.h:235:8: error: use of overloaded operator '<<' is ambiguous (with operand types 'basic_ostream<char, char_traits<char>>' and 'const sys_seconds' (aka 'const time_point<std::chrono::system_clock, std::chrono::duration<long long, std::ratio<1, 1>>>'))
  229 |     os << tp << " is in a gap between\n"
      |     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  230 |        << local_seconds{i.first.end.time_since_epoch()} + i.first.offset << ' '
      |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  231 |        << i.first.abbrev << " and\n"
      |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  232 |        << local_seconds{i.second.begin.time_since_epoch()} + i.second.offset << ' '
      |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  233 |        << i.second.abbrev
      |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  234 |        << " which are both equivalent to\n"
      |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  235 |        << i.first.end << " UTC";
      |        ^  ~~~~~~~~~~~
[...]
